mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name, status, is_admin) VALUES (#{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{status}, #{isAdmin})
mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password_hash, display_name, status, is_admin, created_at FROM users WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
